name: public_safety_communications_outage_redwood_rig_utl
premise: Resource deployment, civil liberties, and downstream liability are tightening together. Resource deployment, civil liberties, and downstream liability are tightening together. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: public safety communications outage redwood rig utl. The moral tension is explicitly framed as rights versus utility: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A union steward and a patient-family advocate are both on the bridge demanding incompatible assurances. Telemetry and logs are diverging; the SOC lead will freeze writes in twelve minutes if no accountable owner signs off. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Keisha Diallo
agents.identity: I am Keisha Diallo, the accountable decision-maker on this Public Safety bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes utility whenever someone invokes rights.

agents.name: Noah Mensah
agents.identity: I am Noah Mensah, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so utility is not sacrificed by default just because rights feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect utility.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Keisha Diallo must decide under rights versus utility. What does Keisha Diallo do?
